system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation against TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You draw upon the energies of the sun, using its strength to attain perfect tranquility and overcome hardship. To use this Technique, you must meditate for an hour in at least partial sunshine. Roll Meditation against TN 6. On a Success, you can ignore any penalties caused by mental or physical distraction or even weakness for one day. Additionally, you recover Imbalance Points at double the normal rate while meditating using this Technique. On a Total Success, the time required to meditate is halved. On a Failure, nothing happens. Requirement: Such perfect harmony can only be achieved by a castrated male. This Technique is contained in the Merciless Willow Manual. Cathartic: Meditation time is reduced to one round (one Skill action on a Total Success), but you do not recover any Imbalance Points. In addition to the effects above, all temporarily drained Ranks of Qi and Defense (such as Hardiness) are restored.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.accessNotes: This Technique is contained in the Merciless Willow Manual.
